title: Stack buffer overflow in `_vl_moddiv_w` due to unchecked `words` exceeding `VL_MULS_MAX_WORDS`

features.name: large replication factor in division
features.description: Code should include division operation where both operands use large replication factors (e.g., 3000 and 2000) that create values exceeding VL_MULS_MAX_WORDS

features.name: large replication factor in modulo
features.description: Code should include modulo operation where both operands use large replication factors that create values exceeding VL_MULS_MAX_WORDS

features.name: wide replication causing multi-word arithmetic overflow
features.description: Code should include replication with factor exceeding 2048 (VL_MULS_MAX_WORDS) applied to a 2-bit value in an arithmetic operation
